title: osmia verbenacea
intro: Osmia verbenacea, also known as Beebalm or Red Mountain Mint, is a perennial plant native to North America, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The medicinal properties of Osmia verbenacea include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include relief from digestive problems, sore throats, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Osmia verbenacea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine as a topical application for skin irritations and wounds.
